title: Vitalvet: Your trusted partner in animal health
description: BUSINESS NEWS - From humble beginnings to...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - From humble beginnings to becoming a trusted pillar in the Garden Route, Vitalvet’s journey has been incredible. “We’re bursting with gratitude as we reflect on our growth, our impact and our achievements,” said the team.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - From humble beginnings to becoming a trusted pillar in the Garden Route, Vitalvet’s journey has been incredible. “We’re bursting with gratitude as we reflect on our growth, our impact and our achievements,” said the team."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Vitalvet’s Mossel Bay branch, located on the corner of Spring and Church streets, is a fully operational animal clinic and provides services such as consultations, sterilisations, dental work-ups and X-rays, in addition to veterinarian and support staff available every day to attend to your pets."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Equipped with an on-site theatre and in-house laboratory, you, the pet owner, are sure to receive the best care for your animals.","html":"Equipped with an on-site theatre and in-house laboratory, you, the pet owner, are sure to receive the best care for your animals."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"But it’s much more than the infrastructure - at the heart of Vitalvet is the people. The veterinary team, veterinary nurses, support staff and receptionists deliver care with empathy and expertise, providing comfort and ensuring intensive support is given when needed.","html":"But it’s much more than the infrastructure - at the heart of Vitalvet is the people. The veterinary team, veterinary nurses, support staff and receptionists deliver care with empathy and expertise, providing comfort and ensuring intensive support is given when needed."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Annelie Botes of Vitalvet Mossel Bay with a furry friend.","html":"Annelie Botes of Vitalvet Mossel Bay with a furry friend."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Vitalvet Mossel Bay team is also deeply rooted in the community of Albertinia, providing services such as vaccinations and deworming, led by veterinary nurse Ilse Wyatt-Goodall.","html":"The Vitalvet Mossel Bay team is also deeply rooted in the community of Albertinia, providing services such as vaccinations and deworming, led by veterinary nurse Ilse Wyatt-Goodall."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"What began as a response to an overwhelming need for animal care has now become a vital service, ensuring that the animals of this small community receive the care they deserve.","html":"What began as a response to an overwhelming need for animal care has now become a vital service, ensuring that the animals of this small community receive the care they deserve."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Veterinary nurse Ilse Wyatt-Goodall has been leading the Vitalvet Mossel Bay team in providing care to the animals of Albertinia.","html":"Veterinary nurse Ilse Wyatt-Goodall has been leading the Vitalvet Mossel Bay team in providing care to the animals of Albertinia."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Vitalvet was humbled to have won two Best of George Readers’ Choice Awards this year, a testament to its excellent work in the Garden Route.","html":"Vitalvet was humbled to have won two Best of George Readers’ Choice Awards this year, a testament to its excellent work in the Garden Route."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“To every client who trusts us with their beloved pets, every patient who fought their way back to health and every community member who supports us - thank you. We have a lot to look forward to in 2026.”"},{"type":"list","items":["Cnr of Church & Spring Streets, Mossel Bay","044 690 6000","[email protected]"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dr Kayleigh-Jean Legge has become a beloved veterinarian among the clients due to her extraordinary passion for animals.","html":"Dr Kayleigh-Jean Legge has become a beloved veterinarian among the clients due to her extraordinary passion for animals."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dr Renee Perold is extremely passionate about all things related to small animals - medicine, surgery, emergency and intensive care.","html":"Dr Renee Perold is extremely passionate about all things related to small animals - medicine, surgery, emergency and intensive care."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
